feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SD: Trigger billing after GI posting
entry.content:
Hello gurus,

 

we would like to automatically trigger creation of a bill when GI is posted for the delivery.

 

I.e. user creates sales order, creates delivery and posts the GI for the delivery. Now the bill for that delivery is to be created automatically.

 

It seems, SAP CRM does have a feature for this, but is it possible in ECC as well?

 

Thanks
Jens

entry.title: Intercompany credit memo
entry.content:
Hi ,

Intercompany credit memo is not working even CR to IG copy control is maintained with routing 013.

When trying to create the intercompany billing IG system is showing "full quantity invoice".  When I am selecting IG manually while creating the Billing document then system is allowing to create IG document but in this case sales area and payer got copied from credit memo request but here payer and should should be different.

All the required settings is maintained in system.

Please suggest your valuable inputs.

entry.title: In a sales order, is it not possible, to delete more than one line at once?
Price is not getting copied from standard invoice to return order when BAPI is used
entry.content: I have a scenario where I am trying to create return order with reference to standard invoice using function module SD_SALESDOCUMENT_CREATE. But price is not getting copied. I have set pricing type as "G" in VTAF. But when I create return order manually through VA01 it copies the pricing. Please help urgent. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: how to delete condition table (C901)
entry.content: hi I want to clean DEV system ,there are two condition table (C901&C902), I delete it in se11 ,but it still exist in se80 and vkoa，how to delete it . thanks

entry.title: Budget Transfer Timing for STO Transactions
entry.content:
Hello All,

I hope this message finds you well.

I have a query regarding our current process for transferring materials between projects using Stock Transport Orders (STOs) within our multiple SAP plants. When we transfer materials from Project A to Project B, the associated budget amount is immediately debited from Project A and credited to Project B, even if the material is still in transit or the Goods Receipt Notice (GRN) is pending.

This early budget transfer complicates our financial tracking, as the funds are shifted before the materials are officially received at Plant B.

Is there a solution or configuration within SAP that would allow us to withhold the budget transfer until the materials have been received and verified at Plant B? Your insights on optimizing this process would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your assistance!

entry.title: Net value is 0 in settlement document SD
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I want to mention a problem that I faced. 

I'm trying to create settlement document with WB2R_SC. When I create the document net and gross value does not update. I can see prices and conditions in item details but net and gross value is zero. How can i solve this problem? 

I'm waiting for your solution advises.
Thanks.

entry.title: How to copy "Create On" and "Time" data on VA03
entry.content:
Kindly help me on how to copy the CREATE ON date and time from the T-code VA03 tab Sales.

My Script is not working properly:

Session.findById("wnd[0]").maximize
Session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/okcd").Text = "/NVA03"
Session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0
Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtVBAK-VBELN").Text = "2201319443"
Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtVBAK-VBELN").caretPosition = 10
Session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0
Session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0
Session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 26
Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_HEAD/tabpT\01").Select
Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/subSUBSCREEN_HEADER:SAPMV45A:4012/txtVBAK-BSTNK").SetFocus
Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/subSUBSCREEN_HEADER:SAPMV45A:4012/txtVBAK-BSTNK").caretPosition = 10

Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_HEAD/tabpT\01/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4301/ctxtVBAK-ERDAT").caretPosition = 10
Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_HEAD/tabpT\01/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4301/ctxtVBAK-ERDAT").selectColumn "ERDAT"
Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_HEAD/tabpT\01/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4301/ctxtVBAK-ERDAT").contextMenu
Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_HEAD/tabpT\01/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4301/ctxtVBAK-ERDAT").selectContextMenuItemByPosition "0"

ThisWorkbook.Sheets("Sheet1").Range("K10").PasteSpecial SkipBlanks:=True

entry.title: in sap
sales billing quantity based on schedule lines
entry.content:
Hello Experts , 

Our customer requires sales billing before delivery for export , although quantities in billing document must be copied from schedule lines quantities in sales order . Is that possible if yes how to do so ?

Thank you!

entry.title: Not able to change profit center from 102 to 101 in sales order (VA02)
entry.content:
Hello,

I am facing one issue, where i am not able to change profit center from 102 to 101 in sales order (VA02), it is giving a prompt like "Profit center set to 102". Any one faced similar issue.

entry.title: Outbound Delivery show error msg: VL063
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please help, 

The current outstanding sales quantity is 195,000, and an over-delivery tolerance of 10% has been set.

However, the delivery quantity in DN can only be assigned a maximum of 142,000. and setting the quantity to 142,001 will result in a error message VL063-Overdelivery tolerance of 10% has been exceeded.

Can anyone help?

Thanks All !!

entry.title: CMIR Classification Data Extraction
entry.content:
Hi,

we have Extracted CMIR Data form the Table -KNMT

Please suggest how to Extract CMIR Classification data per customer+material along with Characteristics Value.

Regards

Siva

entry.title: When Entering a Sales Order getting message KIC180 You must enter company code error
entry.content:
We are trying to set a new entity to complete Sales Orders, we have already had one entity set up by our SAP partner, but we trying to understand this ourselves


I have completed the steps detailed below but when I try to Enter a Sales order (VA01) at the header stage I get message “You must enter a company code for transaction Create sales document Message no. KI180” (SAP message KIC180 You must enter a company code for tr)

As I do not get this when I enter a Sales Order for our previous entity.

Can anyone advise where I should be checking as clearly, I have missed a configuration step, thank you

The steps I have completed are;

Sales Organisation definition     

  1. Step 1-Create Credit Control Area - previously completed.
  2. Step 2- Assign Company Code to Credit Control Area - previously completed.
  3. Step 3- Define Sales Organization (IMG->Enterprise Structure->Definition->Sales & Distribution)
  4. Step 4- Assign Sales Org to Company Code (IMG->Enterprise Structure->Assignment->Sales & Distribution)
  5. Step 5- Define Distribution Channel (IMG->Enterprise Structure->Definition->Sales & Distribution)
  6. Step 6- Assign Distribution Channel to Sales Organization (IMG->Enterprise Structure->Assignment->Sales & Distribution)
  7. Step 7- Create Divisions (IMG->Enterprise Structure->Definition->Sales & Distribution)
  8. Step 8- Assign Divisions to Sales Organizations (IMG->Enterprise Structure->Definition->Sales & Distribution)
  9. Step 9- Set Up Sales Area (All Combinations of Sales Orgs, Distribution Channels & Divisions) (IMG->Enterprise Structure->Definition->Sales & Distribution)

Pricing

  1. Set up pricing determination VOK0->Pricing Procedure-Proc Determination

entry.title: Error while writing Idoc to file in we19
entry.content:
Hi All,

Am getting an error message when trying to write Idoc to file in we19, 

when Enter, I get the below message,

Which gives dump as below,

Short Text
File "/tmp/idocnumber" is already open.

This is happening only for a particular partner. 

Request some insights on the above issue.

Thanks,

Shashi

entry.title: SAP Fiori List Report - OData V4: List Not Refreshing automatically After Action (change)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

A few months ago, I built a Fiori List Report app for the SD module using OData V2 in an on-premise environment. The app had actions like "Remove Block," "Add Block," and "Add Comment," and it worked perfectly—after each action, the list report refreshed automatically and displayed the updated data.

Recently, I created a similar app as a Fiori List Report app, but this time using OData V4 in the same on-premise environment. Unfortunately, the actions no longer refresh the list report after submitting changes always I had to click "GO" in order to get it the list refreshed.

Steps Taken to Identify the Issue:

  1. Adjusted the UI5 Version to both newer and older versions.
  2. Implemented side effects using guided development tools.
  3. Compared the manifest.json, metadata.XML and other app components between the old (OData V2) and new (OData V4) apps and found significant differences.

Despite thorough testing and troubleshooting, I couldn’t resolve the issue.

Request:

Could someone guide me on how to ensure the list report refreshes properly after an action in a Fiori List Report app using OData V4?

Thank you in advance for your help!

Attached are the old and the new manifest

entry.title: Cash discount in debit memo accounting document
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a debit memo created with reference to an invoice (f2). The product is eligible for a cash discount and hence in the debit memo condition type DCD2 is triggered (we use S/4HANA Public cloud and hence DCD2 instead of SKTO).

I noticed that in the accounting document generated for the debit memo, the line item details doesn't show the calculated cash discount amount. I can see cash discount base amount, payment terms, baseline date etc. But the discount amount itself is missing. 

If I check the accounting document of a debit memo without reference, the discount amount is available at line level along with all other details  

Is this standard behavior? Or am I missing anything here?

Any help is appreciated. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Delivery for subcontracting process Mov 631
entry.content:
Hello Guys.

In a situation, the delivery has been made to consignment stock in supplier. With movement 631. The outbound delivery was created in VL01N.

But, i need to return some quantity to my stock, using the movement 632 i believe. Already tried in MIGO, MB11 and others, but none worked.

Do you guys know how can i make these movement ?

Thank you!!

entry.title: Number Ranges for PO number for Sales order number for respective countries
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

The user requriment is as follows

what is the sequence number for PO number for Sales order number for respective countries?

Where can i find this information. We are in ECC 6.0

Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: Sales rebates - condition contract
entry.content:
Dear experts , 

Our customer requirement for sales rebates is to set in a condition contract for each customer for several material groups . 

For example : 

business volume is calculated by Liter (L) : for Target for Group 1 = 10.000 L  and Target for Group 2 = 20.000 L

Material groupRealised TargetRebate 
Group 1>80% (8.000 L)2.5% of sales revenue realised on group 1
>100%(10.000 L)4.5% of sales revenue realised on group 1
Group 2>80% (16.000 L)2.5%of sales revenue realised on group 2
>100% (20.000 L)5% of sales revenue realised on group 2

Could you please tell me what condition contract type to use in order to calculate business volume and how to calculate sales rebate based on sales revenue by material group ?

 

Thank you in advance
